title: Ultimate VR Modpack!
description:
This project adds amazing immersion into Minecraft! 
It also works on PC!
body:
[![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c9db07785e647b459110a4c7b654f7527ce4779.gif)](https://modrinth.com/project/cY8pcjDg)
# **Ultimate VR Modpack!** 
Ultimate VR modpack is a modpack for Minecraft Vivecraft players who love **adventure** and **fun!** 
and this modpack also works on pc without a vr! 

I made this modpack to make VR be a amazing experience. 
### This modpack includes: 
- Better/new structures, 
- UI tweaks, 
- More realistic weather and particles, 
- If you break 1 piece of tree the rest of tree falls, 
- Mob animations, 
- Block/Item textures, 
- Optimisation, 
- And more! 

**Questcraft untested**
